_note: Recipe feed: 6-10 dinner candidates, viral or highly-rated. Refreshed every ~3 weeks by GHA cron.

items.title: Broken Lasagna Noodle Soup with Spinach
items.note: Rebecca Firkser's weeknight lasagna soup from the April/May issue, starch cooks right into the broth for body without the oven commitment.

items.title: Sun-Dried Tomato Salmon
items.note: Kitchn's executive editor swears by this one, creamy sun-dried tomato sauce over salmon you probably have frozen right now.

items.title: Kenji's Spring Veggie Salad with Labneh
items.note: Kenji's blanched spring vegetable situation with labneh smoothing everything out, getting TikTok traction this week for good reason.

items.title: One-Pan Harissa Orange Chicken and Broccoli
items.note: Sheet pan chicken that actually has a point of view, harissa and orange doing the work while cleanup stays minimal.

items.title: Jon and Vinny's Creamy Tomato Pasta
items.note: LA restaurant's butter and cream pasta that looks too simple to be this good, cooks who tested it say it absolutely delivers.

items.title: Israeli-Style Hummus
items.note: Serious Eats' puree garlic in lemon juice trick for smooth hummus that's worth making a mezze dinner around, hot chickpeas are key.

items.title: Tuscan Ground Beef and Potatoes
items.note: One-pan ground beef in creamy sun-dried tomato parmesan sauce, Kitchn editors flagging this for May weeknight rotation.

items.title: Filipino Beef Short Ribs Adobo
items.note: Overnight braise that tastes better the next day, Kitchn's food editor calling this her 2026 cooking bucket list priority.
